MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-17-2021 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE AUG-17-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT BMW OF NORTH AMERICA, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY ALL PROCEEDINGS, HE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)
